budget: One bounded implementation card owned by the Claude lane (coordinator-reassigned from the preferred Codex lane with user approval, 2026-07-16). Implement the Phase-2 typed memory substrate: a new src/metaharness/memory package with append-only typed MemoryRecord stores (working/episodic/semantic/procedural kinds), activation lifecycle with evidence-preserving tombstoning, receipted mutation, commit-before-log audit ordering, bounded SpecialistTaskAction authorization, and a memory-skill health circuit breaker; SQLite/WAL-backed durability with schema migrations and FTS5 lexical search; a deterministic scaffold-only LOG/CONSULT baseline operating through a shadow MemoryActionBroker restricted to allowlisted scoped operations (search, read, create_candidate, append, upsert, revise_candidate, link, compress_candidate) that rejects unknown operations, path traversal, cross-scope IDs, immutable-evidence writes, lifecycle bypass, and domain task actions, emitting immutable self-verifying MemoryActionReceipt records; and additive context-contract boundary validators closing META5-MEM-002, 003, 006, 010, 012, 014, and 015. Flip the closed contracts strict xfails to enforced tests and update tests/fixtures/meta5 corpus statuses; META5-MEM-009 and META5-MEM-011 remain strict expected failures reserved for TASK-20260714-008 and TASK-20260714-007. Live prompts, fitted messages, and request bytes remain byte-identical. No memory.training or memory.promotion implementation, no retrieval wiring into workers, no prompt activation, no optimizer, no evaluator evolution, no weight training, no deployment, no playbook migration, and no new runtime authority.
stopCondition: Stop and fail closed on any live prompt, fitted-message, or request-byte change; any grant to a specialist of domain-action commit, visibility-widening, evaluator, promotion, deployment, or self-approval authority; destructive deletion or durable activation exposed as a direct model action; any unreceipted mutation path; weakening or deletion of existing META-4/META-5 test assertions; H/E/W drift; owned-path expansion; nondeterministic scaffold-baseline output; a failing acceptance command; or an unresolved independent-review P0/P1 finding.
evaluatorAuthority: The implementing seat cannot self-approve. Coordinator integration and acceptance require immutable focused and full test evidence plus an independent adversarial review panel (GLM-5.2 frozen-diff, codex CLI, Claude reviewer) with no unresolved P0/P1 findings, and independent MiniMax-M3 behavioral verification with its own scratch probes. An xfail flip counts as implemented capability only with a green enforced test and review acceptance.
nextCheckpoint: The src/metaharness/memory package exists with append-only stores, activation lifecycle, receipted mutation, and commit-ordered audit; the shadow MemoryActionBroker and immutable MemoryActionReceipt validate allowlisted scoped operations; the scaffold-only LOG/CONSULT baseline is deterministic; thirteen META5-MEM contracts are enforced while META5-MEM-009 and META5-MEM-011 remain strict expected failures.
